title: Susurration Baby Blanket for Unisex Boys Girls, Soft Fluffy Crib Blankets with Muslin Cotton Front and Dotted Fleece Back, Receiving Blanket for Baby Newborn Infant, 75x100 cm (Bluemoon)
features: Premium Material: Our baby blankets for unisex boys girls are made of 100% muslin cotton on the front and ultra soft dot fleece fabric on the back. This combination ensures warmth and comfort, making it gentle on your baby's sensitive skin. Perfect for all seasons, it creates a cozy environment for your little one to sleep soundly.

Perfect Size & Versatile Use: Measuring 75x100 cm, this blanket is ideal for wrapping or swaddling your baby. The plush fleece backing provides a sense of security, akin to the embrace of a mother's arms. Use it as a receiving blanket, stroller cover, crib blanket, or even a play mat—it's designed for every moment.

Charming Designs: Our baby blanket collection features a variety of stylish designs in soft, calming colors. These eye-catching designs are perfect for both baby boys and girls, adding a touch of charm to any nursery decor.

Breathable & Easy Care: Lightweight and breathable, this blanket is suitable for year-round use. It’s machine washable and becomes even softer with each wash, ensuring it stays comfy for your baby. Say goodbye to complicated care routines—Simply toss it in the washing machine and dry it at low temperatures.

Perfect Gift for Any Occasion: This baby blanket makes an excellent gift for baby showers, birthdays, or any special occasion. Thoughtfully packaged and beautifully designed, it’s sure to be cherished by both parents and their little ones. Give the gift of comfort and style!
